disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Annular (ring-shaped) erythematous plaques with central clearing and a raised, advancing scaly leading edge
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe exactly what the patches look like?
Do the patches have a clear centre with a raised edge?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're like rings — the older ones have gone a bit clearer in the middle, but the outside edge is raised and a bit flaky. They're red and itchy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New kitten in the household about two weeks before onset (likely zoonotic dermatophyte source)
trigger_question_examples: Have you been around any new animals or pets recently?
Any new exposures at home — pets, gym, shared towels?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: We did get a new kitten about two weeks ago. I hadn't thought of that — could it be from the kitten?

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rash is asymmetric, worse in warm/humid conditions, and moisturiser gave no relief
trigger_question_examples: Is the rash even on both sides, and does anything make it better or worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's more on one side than the other, it flares when I'm hot and sweaty, and the moisturiser didn't do anything for it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No systemic features — denies fever, weight loss and joint pain
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever, weight loss or joint pains with this?
Do you feel unwell in yourself at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, none of that. No fever, I haven't lost any weight and my joints are fine — I just feel itchy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blistering, no pustules or boggy painful swelling, no scalp involvement, and no mucosal (mouth/genital) lesions
trigger_question_examples: Are there any blisters, pus, painful lumps, or any patches on your scalp?
Any sores in your mouth or on the genitals?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No blisters or pus, no painful lumps, nothing on my scalp, and nothing in my mouth or down below. It's just these rings on my skin.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't think so, but I haven't checked my scalp closely.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No personal or family history of eczema/atopy; first-ever episode
trigger_question_examples: Have you ever had eczema or sensitive/atopic skin before?
Is this the first time you've had a rash like this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I've never had eczema or anything like that, and this is the first time I've had a rash like this.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Household with young children; significant patient concern about contagion and spread
trigger_question_examples: Who else is at home with you?
What are you most worried about with this rash?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live with my family and we've got young kids. I'm really worried I'll give it to them or it'll spread around the house.
